name: GetServiceSignalString
title: GetServiceSignalString
syntax: long GetServiceSignalString(serviceSignalString qualifier, char buffer [], dword bufferLength); // form 1
description: Reads the string value of a Service Signal.
return: >=0: Length of the string that has been fetched from the Service Signal.

description: The example shows access to parameter StringValue, which is contained in Event1 of service Service1 (Major Version 1, Instance ID 2). The service interface is defined in package PACKAGE1::PACKAGE2 of database DemoDatabase.
The service qualifier is specified without a leading $ sign.
